name: Rhubarb Citrus Punch
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, simmer the diced rhubarb and water until the rhubarb is soft.
2. Remove from heat and let cool.
3. Strain the mixture to remove the rhubarb pieces.
4. Measure 4 cups of juice and return it to the pot.
5. Add the sugar and stir until dissolved.
6. Chill the mixture in the refrigerator.
7. Stir in the orange and lemon juices.
8. Just before serving, add the ginger ale and strawberries (if using) and pour over ice.
